source1: That I came to be a lawyer felt like a slow-motion accident.
I stopped coming in to the office. I stopped thinking of myself as a lawyer.
source2: I was desperate for something to change when luckily, I discovered Code First Girls through an Instagram ad.
I have realized how valuable many of my 'teacher skills' are.
source3: On paper, it looked perfect. I was getting glowing reviews and bonuses.
